html:
2026-0711
2026-07-18HC, PHACQuarantine ActOrder Amending the Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order, 2026Order Amending the Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order, 2026 in order to reduce the risk of introduction and spread of Ebola disease in Canada by prohibiting entry by foreign nationals who have been in the Democratic Republic of the Congo in the last 21 days, with certain limited exemptions and subject to the existing requirements upon entry.N/A
subject: Order Amending the Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order, 2026
precis: Order Amending the Minimizing the Risk of Exposure to Ebola Disease in Canada Order, 2026 in order to reduce the risk of introduction and spread of Ebola disease in Canada by prohibiting entry by foreign nationals who have been in the Democratic Republic of the Congo in the last 21 days, with certain limited exemptions and subject to the existing requirements upon entry.
